InuYasha Fan Fiction ❯ A Miko's Instincts

[ T - Teen: Not suitable for readers under 13 ]
By: Majicman55
InuYasha has the watch when he notices Kagome is having a dream. Her scent is having an odd effect on him. What could she be dreaming?

Please be aware that this is not some kind of major rewrite...just a few tweaks here and there that I've always meant to do.

Anime/Manga: InuYasha Fan Fiction | Genre(s): Romance / Comedy | Type: Other | Uploaded On: 04.18.2008 | Pages: 207 | Words: 139.6K | Visits: 167.5K | Status: Completed
